what_card1_p1: Pairmo is a multi-domain swipe matching platform that connects people, services and opportunities.
what_card1_p2: Instead of browsing long lists of ads or waiting for replies, users discover opportunities instantly by swiping through cards.
what_card1_p3: Pairmo brings together jobs, travel partners, services, pets, rentals and business collaborations in one platform.
what_card2_p1: Today most platforms work only in one direction: either you search or you post.
what_card2_p2: Pairmo solves the problem of fragmented platforms.
what_card2_p3: Users can find partners, clients, services or communities in seconds.
what_card3_p1: Users create cards describing what they offer or what they need.
what_card3_p2: The platform shows relevant opportunities through a smart swipe discovery system.
what_card3_p3: When interests align, a match is created and users can start collaborating.
how_subtitle: A simple swipe flow designed for real-life needs.
how_swipe_text: Discover people, services and opportunities across multiple domains.
how_match_text: When interests align, Pairmo creates an instant connection.
how_connect_text: Start conversations and turn matches into real plans and experiences.
inside_subtitle: Discover how Pairmo connects people, services and opportunities through a simple swipe experience.
inside_step1_text: Start by choosing the domain that matches your need.
inside_step2_text: Describe what you offer or what you are looking for.
inside_step3_text: Discover relevant cards through the swipe interface.
inside_step4_text: Access your dashboard to manage matches and conversations.
roadmap_subtitle: The evolution of Pairmo into a global multi-domain ecosystem.
roadmap_phase3_transactions: Platform-handled transactions for services and mobility
roadmap_phase3_programs: Pairmo For Help • Pairmo Social Grant Program
newsletter_success: You are now on the list!
contact_text: Questions, partnerships or early access? Reach out anytime.
